title: Festool
tagline: DIN-driven product-commerce, three theses on hierarchy and IA. Brand-faithful refresh: same palette and type, sharpened scale, scrim'd hero, sized 6-up grid.

direction.phrase: Redesign this home page for presales. Brand-faithful Mode A. Three variants: A Conservative refresh, B Compositional shift, C Bold direction.

originalCritique: Hero text floats over a photo without a scrim. The heading scale is ad-hoc — at least four near-identical sizes between 28–44px. The 6-up "Discover Festool" grid treats every tile equally, eroding hierarchy. The page tells you nothing about what's new for the trade — it tells you what marketing shipped this quarter.

variants.name: Conservative refresh
variants.thesis: Same IA, modernised tokens. Hero gains a contrast scrim with the product name leading; heading scale snaps to 1.25 modular; the 6-up grid gets a 2-up feature tile; long-form copy moves to a single readable column with drop initials.
variants.fix: Same IA, modernised tokens. Hero text moves to a left-rail block over a contrast scrim; product name leads, value follows. Heading scale snaps to a major-third (1.25) modular ratio. The 6-up grid gets size hierarchy: one feature tile spans 2 cells, the rest are single. The risk-averse stakeholder option — almost nothing the legal team would push back on.

variants.name: JTBD-led
variants.thesis: Same palette, type, photography. Different homepage thesis: a job-to-be-done router (Cordless · Sanding · Dust extraction · Mobility · Service) replaces the single hero campaign. Service-equal band rises above the brand teaser.
variants.fix: Same palette, type, photography. Different homepage thesis. The page opens with a job-to-be-done router (Cordless · Sanding · Dust extraction · Mobility · Service), not a single hero campaign. The "Tabless" cordless campaign moves into the cordless route as a detail panel. Service-equal band rises above the brand teaser because for owners, service is the most-used surface.

variants.name: Bold direction
variants.thesis: DIN at 96px on the hero — single declarative line, the brand mark gets to be the brand mark. A green ground-line motif runs through every section break, an industrial signal that ties hero to footer.
variants.fix: DIN at 96px on the hero — single declarative line, the brand mark gets to be the brand mark instead of a logo lockup. A green ground-line motif runs through every section break, an industrial-engineering signal that ties hero to footer. Same IA as A, but every section gains a single confident move.
